channel.title: 404: NOT_FOUND Code: NOT_FOUND ID
channel.description:
Description of your issue
Frontity plugin installed Deployed on Vercel Redirection on vercel to domain configured Frontity.settings configured
Site return 404

item.title: 404: NOT_FOUND Code: NOT_FOUND ID
item.dc:creator: mburridge
item.description:
Hi @987456132jw

I’m afraid you’ve provided insufficient information. For anyone to be able to help you you’ll need to provide a more complete description of your site configuration, the problem that you’re encountering, and the steps that you’ve already taken to try to resolve the issue.

Please see here for the kind of information that you can provide that will help others to help you.

Read full topic
